citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: A schema specifies the attributes of the concept being described, and its relationships to other concepts, e.g., the Restaurant schema inherits properties from the FoodEstablishment schema.
